shortDescription: Well-maintained 4-bedroom semi in Palmerston with updated kitchen and south-facing garden.
fullDescription: Welcome to 234 Manning Avenue in the vibrant Palmerston neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. All 4 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
